passes.title: American Repertory Theatre
passes.benefit_text:
617-547-8300
The American Repertory Theater (A.R.T.) at Harvard University is a leading force in the American theater, producing groundbreaking work that is driven by risk-taking and passionate inquiry. A.R.T. was founded in 1980 by Robert Brustein, who served as Artistic Director until 2002, when he was succeeded by Robert Woodruff. Diane Paulus began her tenure as Terrie and Bradley Bloom Artistic Director in 2008.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. In addition, your IP address and browser information is stored in server logs and used to generate anonymized usage statistics. Your institution uses these statistics to gauge the use of library content, and the information is not shared with any third parties.

passes.title: Boch Center Tours
passes.benefit_text:
Located just steps away from downtown Boston, a visit to the Boch Center Wang Theatre will make you feel like you've been magically transported to a European Palace. Tours of the theatre are offered several days per week and share the rich history of the Wang Theatre over the past 100 years. Beyond the basic theatre history, a tour includes the opportunity to experience the Folk Americana Roots Hall of Fame (FARHOF). FARHOF showcases the history of American music through multiple exhibits that change quarterly. 
Visits are available at set times each day and full tours may not be available on all days. Please visit www.bochcenter.org/tours to learn more about the schedule and availability.
The Behind the Scenes Tour is guided, while the Exhibit Hours option is self-guided like a regular museum visit, so booking both opetions is not necessary or recommended.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. In addition, your IP address and browser information is stored in server logs and used to generate anonymized usage statistics. Your institution uses these statistics to gauge the use of library content, and the information is not shared with any third parties.

passes.title: Hale South Beach Day (digital pass)
passes.benefit_text: Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. The pass includes access to: Hale’s South Entrance parking lots; private beach access with swimming and boating; picnic/playground areas; restrooms and rinse stations; volleyball and basketball courts; canoes, kayaks, and more. South Beach Access — Pre-Season: May 23–June 21, weekends only, 12–6 PM; Program Season: June 22–Aug. 16, weekdays 9 AM–7 PM, weekends 10 AM–6 PM; Post-Season: Aug. 17–31, daily, 12–6 PM.

passes.title: How Do You See the World + Mapparium™ Globe
passes.benefit_text:
210 Massachusetts Avenue, Boston, Massachusetts, 02115
                                                            
    Map
With this pass, we welcome up to four adults free of charge to the Mapparium™ globe in the How Do You See the World? experience (value $6 per Adult). Youth 17 and younger are always free. All other exhibits in the How Do You See the World? experience are always free, as are weekend church tours, and neither require a ticket.
You may redeem this pass for tickets onsite in the Welcome Hall; ticket reservations are not available ahead of time.
All Mapparium showtimes are first come, first serve; this pass doesn't guarantee tickets for a specific time or day.
Just print out this pass and bring it with you or display it on your phone or device.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. In addition, your IP address and browser information is stored in server logs and used to generate anonymized usage statistics. passes.title: Sandwich Glass Museum (digital coupon pass)
source_phrases: The Sandwich Glass Museum is dedicated to the history of the town in which it is located, with a special emphasis on the glass that made it famous in the 19th century. Thirteen galleries display their collection of old and modern examples of glass objects, including roughly 6,000 pieces produced at the Boston & Sandwich Glass Company in the 1800s on the site where the museum sits today. In addition, the museum hosts live demonstrations of glass-blowing. There is a gift store on the premises, which includes work by local glass-blowers.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.

To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. passes.title: TACC x Paddle Boston (coupon code)
passes.benefit_text:
Coupon code good for one boat rental per order.
The American City Coalition (TACC) is a 501(c)(3) organization based in Roxbury’s Nubian Square. We tackle community-identified barriers through economic and workforce development, research, and policy strategies that expand pathways to meaningful opportunities in communities of color. Boston is a coastal city with 47 miles of shoreline; Boston Harbor is the city's largest public open space. Through our Waterways: Connecting Residents of Roxbury and Dorchester to Boston's Waterfront program, TACC is implementing strategies that reduce community-identified barriers to accessing the waterfront and increase the number of Roxbury and Dorchester residents benefitting from living in a coastal city. Reach out to us at waterways@tamcc.org or 857.308.3012 to learn more and get involved.
No passes are available at this time.
To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. In addition, your IP address and browser information is stored in server logs and used to generate anonymized usage statistics. Your institution uses these statistics to gauge the use of library content, and the information is not shared with any third parties.

passes.title: Trustees GO Pass (physical pass)
passes.benefit_text:
Coupon allows two adults and children under 18 entry at Family membership rates. Pass is valid for one-time use at any of 116 properties that collect an admission fee. Pass holder will pay an admission fee equivalent to that of a Trustees Family level membership. Pass is not valid for use at Trustees parking kiosks, stores, cafes, Inns, campgrounds, at special events and programs or in place of any permits or passes. To use GO passes at Fruitlands, deCordova, or Castle Hill, please enter the promo code "GOPASS" when securing a time ticket. For all other properties, please book a Trustees GO Pass.
THIS IS A DISPOSABLE PASS
This pass may be picked up at any time after you make your reservation.
It must be picked up at the location you made the reservation.
It does not need to be returned.
Consult branch operating hours before you pick up the pass.
The email reservation confirmation is NOT a valid coupon.
Note: This pass is limited to one booking per month per person.

To use GO passes at Fruitlands, deCordova, or Castle Hill, please enter the promo code "GOPASS" when securing a time ticket. For all other properties, please book a Trustees GO Pass.

Physical (must be picked up at the library and returned) passes are available. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.

To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. In addition, your IP address and browser information is stored in server logs and used to generate anonymized usage statistics. Your institution uses these statistics to gauge the use of library content, and the information is not shared with any third parties.

passes.title: USS Constitution Museum (e-coupon)
passes.benefit_text:
USS Constitution Museum Building 22, Charlestown, MA, 02129
                                                            
    Map
One pass allows free admission for up to five guests.
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. In addition, your IP address and browser information is stored in server logs and used to generate anonymized usage statistics. Your institution uses these statistics to gauge the use of library content, and the information is not shared with any third parties.

passes.title: Zoo New England (physical pass)
passes.benefit_text:
Coupon admits 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child.
Note: This pass is limited to one booking per month per person.
Physical (must be picked up at the library and returned) passes are available. Select your location preference and then pick the dates from the availability calendar.
To use this platform, the system writes one or more cookies in your browser. These cookies are not shared with any third parties. In addition, your IP address and browser information is stored in server logs and used to generate anonymized usage statistics. Your institution uses these statistics to gauge the use of library content, and the information is not shared with any third parties.
